name: detector contract: --cache-key <key> enables E-12 per-rule per-file cache lookup
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --cache-key "test-key-1" --paths "src/**/*.ts" | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);if(typeof r.cache_status==="string"){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: missing cache_status in output\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts
